Name: NIST SP 800-53 Revision 5 - Vercel
Description: NIST SP 800-53 Revision 5 mapping for Vercel provider checks. These mappings assess customer-side security controls on the Vercel platform.

Requirements.Name: AC-2 Account Management
Requirements.Description: The organization manages information system accounts, including establishing, activating, modifying, reviewing, disabling, and removing accounts.

Requirements.Name: AC-3 Access Enforcement
Requirements.Description: The information system enforces approved authorizations for logical access to information and system resources in accordance with applicable access control policies.

Requirements.Name: AC-6 Least Privilege
Requirements.Description: The organization employs the principle of least privilege, allowing only authorized accesses for users which are necessary to accomplish assigned tasks.

Requirements.Name: IA-2 Identification and Authentication
Requirements.Description: The information system uniquely identifies and authenticates organizational users.

Requirements.Name: SC-8 Transmission Confidentiality and Integrity
Requirements.Description: The information system protects the confidentiality and integrity of transmitted information.

Requirements.Name: SC-12 Cryptographic Key Establishment and Management
Requirements.Description: The organization establishes and manages cryptographic keys for required cryptography employed within the information system.

Requirements.Name: SI-4 Information System Monitoring
Requirements.Description: The organization monitors the information system to detect attacks and indicators of potential attacks.
